variants.name: 柴郡猫
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你会得知你的“漫游”标记所在玩家的角色。 [Wandering]
variants.firstNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
variants.otherNightReminder: Learns the roll of the player their *WANDERING* token is on. :reminder:
variants.flavor: but a grin without a cat! It’s the most curious thing I ever saw in all my life!
